name: Smothered Okra and Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 3 cups chopped, peeled, and seeded tomatoes, or 3 cups chopped canned tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 300 degrees F.
2. Wash the okra under cool water and cut off the stems. Slice each pod crosswise into 1/2-inch rounds.
3. Combine the okra and the remaining ingredients in a large heavy ovenproof pot (not cast iron). Mix well.
4. Cover the pot with a lid and bake, stirring occasionally, for 1 1/2 to 2 hours, or until the slime has disappeared.
5. Bake, uncovered, for the last 15 minutes of the cooking time. The total time will vary depending on the tenderness of the okra.
6. Remove the bay leaves. Serve immediately or let cool completely and store in freezer containers.
